title: Plasticxo Revamp (Classic)
description: A Revamp made by Akooa of my pack Plasticxo (with classic lengh swords)
body:
This Plasticxo Revamp made by Akooa is a 1.8.9 pvp texture pack made for bedwars but usable in other 1.8.9 gamemodes as well.

It features a very "Plastic" themed with thick black borders arround items.

It was release due to my channel reaching 300 subscribers !

It's the classic version of the pack, there is also a Skinny swords & a Thick sword variant both available on my account :)

Here are some ingame screenshots :


![Plasticxo Classic Revamp - 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42c92e736247de9a5d9b745edb65dd80d0802938.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Classic Revamp - 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e102da5e11510ff67b0d279efdaf0f64e2a03aee.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Classic Revamp - 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6c83df22dafed81594ae1dab7afac4ab3528bb9.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
